title: Unique 33443EU Eco-Friendly Square Paper Plates-23 cm-Silver Colour-14 Count (Pack of 1), Pack of 14
features: Pack of 14 Square Silver Party Plates
Square paper plates measure approximately 23 cm x 23 cm
Ideal for serving food at a birthday party, Christmas or New Year's Eve party
Combine with other silver party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description High on style, low on fuss, these elegant, disposable square silver paper plates make it a pleasure to entertain guests. Use these eco-friendly silver paper plates to serve delicious party foods and desserts at your next special occasion. Silver plates are ideal for a wedding, New Year's Eve party, silver wedding anniversary party, or Christmas party. Square paper plates are disposable, which makes cleaning up after the party is over really quick and convenient. As these plates are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Safety Warning No warning applicable
